body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/query 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/query 
 ## 接口描述 
回单列表查询。
支付回单查询单据id数量不可超过50。
下载回单使用的fileName为返回值列表data中的fileName值。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billIdList","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%20%20%222025041404177979%22%20%20%20%5D","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8750","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","maxLength":"","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"8618"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEID","exampleValue":"2025041404177979"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"oboSeqId","label":"%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"129789"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileName","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"32e177f4-2d4d-4d3a-8745-55b076bcea25","desc":"%20%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%8D%E5%B8%A6%E5%90%8E%E7%BC%80%EF%BC%8Cuuid","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileShowName","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%8E%9F%E5%A7%8B%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E6%B5%81%E7%A8%8B.png","desc":"","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"receiptBusinessNumber","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025041404177979-1","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"receiptNumber","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"991B720015684","maxLength":"600"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"receiptAccountNumber","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"755937155610003","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bankType","label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"CMB","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"transactionDate","label":"%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2025-01-22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bankTransactionNumber","label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E6%B5%81%E6%B0%B4%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"C0446VC00008JOZ","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"checkCode","label":"%E5%AF%B9%E8%B4%A6%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"DZM202411210000004069","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"amount","label":"%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"1.00","maxLength":"","desc":"%20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B015%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%A4%E4%BD%8D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceFlag","label":"%E6%9D%A5%E6%BA%90%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","desc":"%20MANUAL-%E6%89%8B%E5%8A%A8%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%EF%BC%8CSYNC-%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5","exampleValue":"MANUAL","maxLength":"20"}}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","exampleValue":"true","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%8A%A5%E6%96%87","required":false}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{ 
    "billIdList": [
        2025041404177979
    ]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": [
        {
            "seqId": 8618,
            "billId": 2025041404177979,
            "oboSeqId": 129789,
            "fileName": "32e177f4-2d4d-4d3a-8745-55b076bcea25",
            "fileShowName": "单据下载流程.png",
            "receiptBusinessNumber": "2025041404177979-1",
            "receiptNumber": null,
            "receiptAccountNumber": "755937155610003",
            "bankType": null,
            "transactionDate": null,
            "bankTransactionNumber": null,
            "checkCode": null,
            "amount": 1.00,
            "sourceFlag": "MANUAL"
        }
    ],
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | 400 | 支付回单查询条件不能为空，请确认后重试 |  |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/query

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/query

接口描述

回单列表查询。 支付回单查询单据id数量不可超过50。 下载回单使用的fileName为返回值列表data中的fileName值。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billIdList","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%20%20%222025041404177979%22%20%20%20%5D","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8750","required":true}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}
